title: Two Pointers (cont.) + Hypothesis testing

items.label: Null, alternative, p-value, power — fast refresher
interviewQuestions: Define p-value precisely — what is it the probability of?
What goes wrong if you peek at A/B results before the planned end?
Why is statistical significance not the same as practical significance?

items.label: Multiple-testing correction (Bonferroni / FDR)
interviewQuestions: Why does running 20 A/B tests at α=0.05 produce false positives?
Compare Bonferroni vs FDR correction — when each is appropriate.
How do you handle multiple comparisons in a feature-importance analysis?
What goes wrong if you peek at A/B results before the planned end?
Define statistical power in one sentence.
When is FDR correction more appropriate than Bonferroni?
